subject: [PATCH v6 19/20] nfsd: track requested dir attributes

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch tracks the union of requested and supported directory attributes in the delegation, which will be used to ensure that only the relevant attributes are encoded when sending add/remove/rename updates. The patch modifies the nfsd4_verify function to update the delegation with the requested dir attributes, and introduces new macros for tracking dir attributes. This change is part of a larger effort to improve the handling of directory attribute changes in the NFSv4 protocol.
